activities.name: Fast on the Standard Tangle
activities.description:
Just 8s behind my PR from 3 years ago. Maybe I can beat it.

Garmin’s “race an activity” feature is fun for this kind of stuff as it provides continuous ahead/behind feedback

activities.name: Cold, windy, rainy. Thank you Seattle
activities.description: Actually, thank you Tam. Wouldn’t have done it without you!

activities.name: New shoes!
activities.description: Exactly the same make, model, version and size as the last ones, just with 750 fewer miles on them.

activities.name: Almost sunny
activities.description: Short one — we have a house guest

activities.name: Beautiful morning in the sunshine
activities.description: Avoided the canyon to keep my new shoes clean for at least a little longer

activities.name: More Back Yard Ultra route planning
activities.description: With two of the heroes of last year: Herve and Lauren

activities.name: Sunset hill with Tamara
activities.description: She was peppy; I was sluggish. Oh well… good to get out there

activities.name: Meeting old mates for a walk
B is for Burke
activities.description: Big “Expect Delays” crew. Very fun!

activities.name: Repeating a route gets boring…
activities.description: Except when you keep getting faster on it. Done this 37 times in the last three years and today was the fastest by 20s. The secret was to warm up a little first :-)

activities.name: Trying to up the cadence
activities.description: 165 is natural and easy for me, but 170 is super tough somehow. I am either a finely tuned machine, or a rusty old bucket.

activities.name: Delicious cool sunny spring morning
activities.description: 30 seconds ahead of PR pace at 2 miles, then a certain lack of breakfast caught up with me. Several stops, but a great run anyway.

activities.name: Give way to horses
activities.description: With the gang at Bridle Trails on a beautiful sunny morning

activities.name: Cheaper by the dozen
activities.description: Most ever repeats of my home hill

activities.name: Nothing middling about the Middle Fork
activities.description: Not quite spring there yet… ferns are still flattened and a few snow patches, but beautiful any time of year.

activities.name: Rambling around the campus
activities.description: 37 years later. I don’t feel as old as I obviously am!

activities.name: Presidio Bluffs Trail with Grace and Chris
activities.description: Spectacular day!

activities.name: Tennessee Valley and Ridges with C & G
activities.description: Another glorious day!

activities.name: Transect of the East Bay Hills
activities.description: Discussing science and other delights with Dave Anderson. Return via BART

activities.name: Perfect morning by the lake
activities.description: With Lauren and Anita

activities.name: Lake Union with Tamara and Steve
activities.description: Great to have Steve back in-country!
